name: TestCaseTitle
title: TestCaseTitle
description: The title of a test case is acquired automatically from the test case name in the CAPL program. It can also be set explicitly together with a test case identifier with the help of this function. The function may only be called within a test case and relates then to the respective test case.

parameters.name: identifier
parameters.description: E.g. a test case number of the test case.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
